name: Peraza Law, P.A
description_short: Miami-based bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7 & 13 filing, foreclosure defense, and debt-related litigation with free initial consultations since 2018.
description_long:
Peraza Law, P.A. is a South Florida law firm founded in 2018 by attorney Manuel A. Peraza, Esq., who brings experience from representing large corporations in collection cases and prior work at one of Florida's largest consumer bankruptcy law firms. The firm positions itself as an affordable legal services provider for individuals and businesses facing financial and legal challenges across multiple practice areas.

The firm's core services center on consumer bankruptcy (Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings), but they also offer civil litigation, foreclosure defense, credit card lawsuit defense, garnishment defense, loan modifications, landlord/tenant dispute resolution, and personal injury representation. All initial case evaluations and consultations are free. They serve multiple South Florida counties including Miami-Dade, Broward, Lee, Collier, and Hillsborough counties.

Peraza Law emphasizes personalized client service through several specific practices: monthly status reports, an open-door policy allowing direct office access without appointment scheduling, and videoconference meeting options. The firm operates with a stated commitment to compassion, care, and commitment, with attorney Peraza handling cases directly. The website includes customer testimonials highlighting responsiveness and case resolution.

As a law firm, Peraza Law is best suited for South Florida consumers and small business owners needing bankruptcy filing assistance or debt-related legal defense. The free consultations reduce upfront barriers, though actual representation costs are not disclosed on the website. The firm's experience with both creditor-side and debtor-side litigation provides some institutional knowledge, though as a relatively newer firm (founded 2018), they lack the established track record of larger bankruptcy practices.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial case evaluations and consultations with no upfront cost
Direct access to attorney Manuel A. Peraza; cases are handled personally rather than delegated to paralegals
Open-door office policy allowing client meetings without advance appointment scheduling
Monthly status report updates provided to all clients
Videoconference meeting options available for remote clients
Serves six Florida counties (Miami-Dade, Broward, Lee, Collier, Hillsborough, and others)
Attorney has prior experience at major Florida bankruptcy firm and collection law background
cons: Relatively new firm (founded 2018) with limited long-term track record compared to established bankruptcy practices
No pricing information disclosed on website; actual bankruptcy filing costs must be discussed during consultation
Limited detail on success rates, average discharge timelines, or case outcomes on the website
Serves only South Florida region; not available for clients in other parts of Florida or other states
Website contains minor grammatical errors and repeated content sections, suggesting limited quality control
best_for: South Florida consumers filing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy who want free initial consultation
Individuals facing foreclosure, garnishment, or credit card lawsuits seeking debt defense representation
Clients who prefer direct attorney contact and personalized service over large firm structures
Business owners in South Florida needing civil litigation or debt-related legal counsel
diagnosis: Peraza Law is best for South Florida residents needing affordable bankruptcy filing (Chapter 7/13) or debt-related legal defense who value free consultations and direct attorney access. Primary caveat: as a newer firm (2018), they lack the established reputation and detailed outcome metrics of larger bankruptcy practices, requiring careful vetting before engagement.
services: Defense against junk debt buyer lawsuits
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1150 NW 72nd Ave Tower 1, Suite 410, Miami, FL 33126
